name: Gramma's Chocolate Peanut Butter Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Make vanilla pudding according to the package directions for a pie.
2. In a double boiler, mix together the peanut butter and egg yolks.
3. Add the peanut butter mixture to the pudding mix, stirring until smooth and no lumps remain. Stir in 10 minutes.
4. Remove from heat, add the butter, and stir to combine.
5. Stir in vanilla.
6. Pour into the pie shell.
7. Sprinkle chocolate chips evenly over the filling.
8. Spread meringue on top of the filling.
9. Bake at 300 degrees for 15-20 minutes until golden brown.
10. The pie tastes best when served cold. Serves 6-8.
